Susie Underpants: Oh, somebody's been doing his buns of steel video.
mister: Well, you want me to uh, clench anything, or-... Susie? Susie.
Susie Underpants: This is for the fourth grade.
mister: Huh? Where, whaddya mean?
Susie Underpants: Whaddo I mean. Whaddya mean, whaddo I mean? I mean underpants, mister, that's what I mean.
mister: What, what's what you mean?
Susie Underpants: My skirt, you lifted, kids laughing. I was Susie Underpants 'till I was 18.
mister: That was in the fourth grade. How could you still be upset about that?
Susie Underpants: Well um, why don't you call me in 20 years and tell me if you're still upset about this.
mister: Alright, I hope you realize you're not getting these underpants back.
